ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the image on the server */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image file */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image file in bytes */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., jpg, png) */,
  "upload_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the image was uploaded */,
  "upload_device" TEXT /* Device used to upload the image (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata in JSON format (e.g., EXIF data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the image from which features were extracted */,
  "eccentricity" REAL /* Eccentricity of the image shape */,
  "aspect_ratio" REAL /* Aspect ratio of the image */,
  "elongation" REAL /* Elongation factor of the image shape */,
  "solidity" REAL /* Solidity of the image shape */,
  "stochastic_convexity" REAL /* Stochastic convexity measure */,
  "isoperimetric_factor" REAL /* Isoperimetric factor */,
  "maximal_indentation_depth" REAL /* Maximal indentation depth */,
  "lobedness" REAL /* Lobedness of the image */,
  "average_intensity" REAL /* Average intensity of the image */,
  "average_contrast" REAL /* Average contrast of the image */,
  "smoothness" REAL /* Smoothness measure of the image */,
  "third_moment" REAL /* Third moment of the intensity distribution */,
  "uniformity" REAL /* Uniformity of the image intensity */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy of the image intensity distribution */,
  "processing_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to process the image */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used for feature extraction */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the feature extraction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_features_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processing_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being processed */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date when the image processing occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the processing (e.g., completed, error) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the processing failed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the image processing */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the image processing */,
  "processing_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the image processing in milliseconds */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used for processing */,
  "processing_node" TEXT /* Identifier of the node or server that processed the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processing_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch of images */,
  "batch_name" TEXT /* Name of the batch */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the batch was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the batch */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the batch processing */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Number of images in the batch */,
  "total_processing_time" INTEGER /* Total time taken to process the batch in milliseconds */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the batch processing */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the batch processing */,
  "processing_node" TEXT /* Identifier of the node or server that processed the batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_batches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_images" (
  "batch_image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch to which the image belongs */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image associated with the batch */,
  "processing_order" INTEGER /* Order in which images were processed within the batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_images_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_images_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES image_batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_analysis_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting's purpose */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the setting */,
  "is_editable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the setting can be edited by users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
